item.title: Chip ‘n Clawz vs. The Brainioids DLC ‘Going Underground’ announced
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Out now for $6.99.

Publisher Arc Games and Phoenix Point developer Snapshot Games have announced action strategy game Chip ‘n Clawz vs. The Brainioids downloadable content “Going Underground.” It is available now for $6.99.

Here is an overview of the new content, via its Steam page:

About

This massive downloadable content expands Chip ‘n Clawz vs. The Brainioids with a brand new story campaign, new enemies to fight, upgrades to collect, and secrets to explore.

Chip ‘n Clawz are in deep trouble! Literally! Their HQ has fallen into a bottomless pit full of creepy crawlies. Worse yet, the local army of alien bugs is commanded by a powerful alien creature who uses telepathy to mess with our heroes.

On the other side of the labyrinth, two Brainioid super-soldiers are sent on a mission to seek and destroy an ancient enemy. Are Chip ‘n Clawz just a bonus target, or can the four heroes find a way to team up against the common threat?

A Brand New Campaign

  • 11 new missions to conquer: a side-campaign with its own story and gameplay twists.
  • New faction: nasty alien bugs come with their own buildings, armies, and strategies.
  • New places to visit: the subterranean cave system comes with unique mechanics and visuals.
  • Area Control missions: the objective that’ll make you rethink all your tactics.
  • Play as the Brainioids and see the world from their point of view.

So Much New Content

  • Seven new enemy types will claw, bite, and explode in your face. They also build bases!
  • The Overseer, a powerful telepathic alien, is the nastiest boss Chip ‘n Clawz have faced to date!
  • Two new guns, four new HQ Mods, and complete new comic book and info card collections.
  • The Rust and Charm statuses will make you go “outch” and “oooh,” respectively.
  • Three new player-versus-player and Skirmish maps available to all players.

Mix ‘n Match

  • Beating story mission 5: “Stating the Blobb-viou” unlocks the new content. You can experience it stand-alone or between missions of the main campaign.
  • All progress carries over: use your new toys in all your favorite levels.
  • All downloadable content content that affects player-versus-player and Skirmish (new weapons, HQ Mods, etc.) is available for free to all players!

Chip ‘n Clawz vs. The Brainioids is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store.

Watch a new trailer below.

DLC “Going Underground” Launch Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/chip-n-clawz-vs-the-brainioids-dlc-going-underground-announced
